query: SELECT te.canonical_hash AS "canonical_hash!: Vec<u8>", so.received_at AS "received_at!: String", so.payload AS "payload?: Vec<u8>", so.signature AS "signature!: Vec<u8>" FROM trust_edges te JOIN signed_objects so ON so.canonical_hash = te.canonical_hash WHERE te.canonical_hash IS NOT NULL AND so.payload IS NOT NULL AND ( (? = 0 AND te.source_user = ?) OR (? = 1 AND te.target_user = ?) OR (? = 2 AND (te.source_user = ? OR te.target_user = ?)) ) AND ( ? IS NULL OR so.received_at > ? OR (so.received_at = ? AND te.canonical_hash > ?) ) ORDER BY so.received_at ASC, te.canonical_hash ASC LIMIT ?
